title: tripleurospermum hygrophilum
intro: Tripleurospermum hygrophilum, also known as marsh calmer, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions like bronchitis and asthma. Marsh calmer can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
